headline: AI for Supply Chain Risk: Disruption Prediction, Supplier Monitoring, and Resilience Analytics
description: AI predicts supply chain disruptions before they happen -- monitoring millions of signals for factory fires, port strikes, and supplier bankruptcies across multi-tier global supply chains. From Resilinc to o9 Solutions, AI supply chain risk management transforms reactive firefighting to proactive resilience.

citation.name: Machine Learning for Supply Chain Risk Management: Disruption Prediction, Supplier Analytics, and Resilience Optimization (2024-2025 Survey)
Digital Twin Supply Chains: Simulation, What-If Analysis, and AI-Driven Resilience Planning
